input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact exposes relocated Jackson APIs under shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*; unshaded com.fasterxml.jackson add-on modules are not appropriate setup for this artifact.
Existing failure appears to be a stale/version-specific test expectation around Jackson enum annotation introspection behavior, not missing external setup.
Tests that intentionally exercise deep Jackson/JDK internals may need JVM --add-opens flags, but normal serialization/deserialization coverage should avoid that and does not require setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: parquet-jackson 1.16.0 is a self-contained shaded Jackson bundle with no transitive runtime dependencies, services, Docker-backed components, or required environment/system properties for normal ObjectMapper/JsonFactory coverage.
